data.description: 1.9.0, the second experimental release for Village & Pillage, is a major update to Bedrock Edition released on February 5, 2019. It adds more features from the Village & Pillage update that weren't added in 1.8.0, such as new flowers, pillagers, new types of stairs and slabs, different wood types for signs, and new blocks. This is the first version released in 2019 for the Nintendo Switch.
